Examples.Title: List all endpoints, can be filtered by type
Examples.Description: Returns a list of all endpoints associated with your account. You can filter the results by type (dedicated or serverless).
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Together;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Create job
Examples.Description: Create a fine-tuning job with the provided model and training data.
Examples.Code:
### Create job
POST {{host}}/fine-tunes
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "training_file": "string",
  "validation_file": "string",
  "packing": true,
  "max_seq_length": 0,
  "model": "string",
  "n_epochs": 1,
  "n_checkpoints": 1,
  "n_evals": 0,
  "batch_size": "max",
  "learning_rate": 0.00001,
  "lr_scheduler": {
    "lr_scheduler_type": "linear",
    "lr_scheduler_args": {
      "min_lr_ratio": 0.0
    }
  },
  "warmup_ratio": 0.0,
  "max_grad_norm": 1.0,
  "weight_decay": 0.0,
  "random_seed": 0,
  "suffix": "string",
  "wandb_api_key": "string",
  "wandb_base_url": "string",
  "wandb_project_name": "string",
  "wandb_name": "string",
  "wandb_entity": "string",
  "train_on_inputs": "auto",
  "training_method": {
    "method": "sft",
    "train_on_inputs": "auto"
  },
  "training_type": "openapi-json-null-sentinel-value-2BF93600-0FE4-4250-987A-E5DDB203E464",
  "multimodal_params": {
    "train_vision": true
  },
  "from_checkpoint": "string",
  "from_hf_model": "string",
  "hf_model_revision": "string",
  "hf_api_token": "string",
  "hf_output_repo_name": "string"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Fine-tuning job initiated successfully
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Cancel job
Examples.Description: Cancel a currently running fine-tuning job. Returns a FinetuneResponseTruncated object.
Examples.Code:
### Cancel job
POST {{host}}/fine-tunes/{{id}}/cancel
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successfully cancelled the fine-tuning job.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Invalid request parameters.
# 404
# Description: Fine-tune ID not found.

Examples.Title: Get metrics
Examples.Description: Retrieves recorded training metrics for a fine-tuning job in chronological order. All filter fields are optional — omit the body or send `{}` to retrieve all metrics.
Examples.Code:
### Get metrics
GET {{host}}/fine-tunes/{{id}}/metrics
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "global_step_from": 0,
  "global_step_to": 500,
  "logged_at_from": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "logged_at_to": "2024-01-01T12:00:00Z",
  "resolution": 100
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: List of metrics snapshots in chronological order.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Invalid request — bad JSON body or missing job ID.
# 404
# Description: Fine-tune job not found.
# 500
# Description: Internal server error — failed to retrieve metrics.
